name: Snow Plow
author: Poki
description: Snow Plow is a simulation game where you hop into a massive snow truck and clear the roads like a pro! Push piles of snow out of the way, collect it all, and sell it for cash to upgrade your truck into an unstoppable plowing beast. Just watch out, you might bump into some unexpected “obstacles” along the way. Can you clear the whole town? How to play Snow Plow? Use your mouse to interact with buttons! Forward: W or the up arrow key Reverse: S or the down arrow key Turn: Use the A and D or left and right arrow keys to turn Camera Adjustment: E Who created Snow Plow? Snow Plow is created by CAMU. Play their other games on Poki: Fox Island Builder , Harvest Simulator , Lucky Claw Machine , Power Wash Cleanup and Urban Racer ! How can I play Snow Plow for free? You can play Snow Plow for free on Poki. Can I play Snow Plow on mobile devices and desktop? Snow Plow can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
